sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Pomerantz LLP Issues Reminder to Shareholders in Perrigo Company plc of Class Action Filing – PRGO
feed.summary: Pomerantz LLP has announced a class action lawsuit against Perrigo Company plc (NYSE:PRGO), reminding shareholders who purchased securities during the Class Period to seek lead plaintiff status by January 16, 2026. The lawsuit stems from significant financial impacts and stock declines following revelations of substantial acquisition and integration-related charges, particularly concerning its infant formula business remediations and a strategic review of that division. Shareholders are encouraged to contact the firm for more information.

feed.title: NetApp Honors Top Partners in India at Partner Summit 2025
feed.summary: NetApp announced the winners of its India Partner Awards for Fiscal Year 2025, celebrating partners who excelled in delivering NetApp solutions for AI, cyber resilience, data infrastructure modernization, and cloud transformation. These awards recognize partners' crucial role in driving NetApp's vision and strategy amidst India's projected US$126.8 billion digital transformation market by 2033, and highlight their commitment to customer success and innovation.

feed.title: Polianta Ltd Makes New Investment in Arch Capital Group Ltd. $ACGL

Institutional ownership of Arch Capital is high at 89.07%, despite recent insider selling by CFO Francois Morin and John M. Pasquesi. feed.title: NXP, Rimac Co-Develop Centralized Architecture for SDVs
feed.summary: NXP Semiconductors and Rimac Technology are partnering to develop centralized architectures for software-defined vehicles (SDVs). This collaboration utilizes NXP’s S32E2 real-time processors to consolidate over 20 electronic control units (ECUs) into just three, simplifying software integration, updates, and the addition of new functionalities. The S32E2's high-performance processing and hardware virtualization capabilities enable efficient management of multiple real-time applications, reducing complexity and bill of materials for OEMs.

feed.title: Thermo Fisher Scientific to Hold Earnings Conference Call on Thursday, January 29, 2026
feed.summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific Inc. (NYSE: TMO) announced it will release its fourth quarter and full-year 2025 financial results before market open on Thursday, January 29, 2026. A conference call to discuss these results and future expectations will be held on the same day at 8:30 a.m. ET. The call will be webcast live on the "Investors" section of their website, www.thermofisher.com.

feed.title: From milestones to momentum: The impact of 2025
feed.summary: The Caterpillar Foundation achieved a historic milestone in 2025, surpassing $1 billion in global giving since its inception in 1952. As part of Caterpillar Inc.'s Centennial World Tour, the Foundation donated nearly $2 million to over 70 charities in 21 countries and engaged employees through matching gift and volunteer programs, demonstrating its commitment to building resilient communities and driving global impact across education, disaster preparedness, and community support.

feed.title: New SueWallSt Podcast Episode: Levi & Korsinsky Breaks Down Freeport-McMoRan Inc. Case
feed.summary: Levi & Korsinsky, LLP has released a new SueWallSt Podcast episode detailing a class action securities lawsuit filed against Freeport-McMoRan Inc. (NYSE:FCX). The lawsuit alleges that Freeport-McMoRan made false statements and concealed inadequate safety measures at its Grasberg Block Cave mine, leading to heightened risks for workers, regulatory issues, litigation, and reputational damage. Investors who lost money between February 15, 2022, and September 24, 2025, are encouraged to contact Levi & Korsinsky for more information.

feed.summary: The Crude Oil Flow Improvers Market is projected to reach USD 2,660.0 million by 2032, growing at a CAGR of 5.3% from 2025, with an estimated value of USD 1,853 million in 2025. feed.title: Nasdaq, Coinbase and S&P Global named Clear Street’s top picks for 2026
feed.summary: Clear Street analysts have identified Nasdaq Inc. (NDAQ), Coinbase Global Inc. (COIN), and S&P Global Inc. (SPGI) as their top investment ideas for 2026, assigning Buy ratings and specific price targets. The selections are based on five key industry themes, including tokenization, regulatory technology demand due to AI fraud, AI-enabled shopping, recovering capital markets, and the expectation of lower interest rates. Nasdaq's consistent dividend growth, Coinbase's blockchain positioning, and S&P Global's multiple catalysts were highlighted as drivers for their respective potentials.

feed.title: SLB Secures Five-Year Aramco Contract to Support Saudi Unconventional Gas Push
feed.summary: SLB has been awarded a five-year contract by Aramco to provide stimulation and digital services for Saudi Arabia's unconventional gas fields. This agreement is part of a multi-billion-dollar program aimed at expanding domestic gas production and supporting Saudi Arabia's Vision 2030 energy transition goals. SLB will deliver advanced stimulation, well intervention, frac automation, and digital solutions to improve efficiency and recovery rates in these complex reservoirs.

feed.title: Best Buy: A Beaten-Down, Attractively Priced, 5% Yielder Hiding In Plain Sight (Rating Upgrade)
feed.summary: Best Buy (BBY) has shown resilience, surpassing Q3 FY'26 earnings estimates with double-digit EPS growth and a 2.7% increase in comparable store sales, reversing prior declines. The company's domestic revenue grew 2.1% while international revenue surged 6.1%. Given these improved fundamentals, a secure 5%+ dividend yield, and anticipated tailwinds from declining interest rates, the author is upgrading BBY from hold to buy.

feed.title: AMD Stock News and Forecasts for Dec. 26, 2025: China MI308 Signals, OpenAI Ramp, and Analyst Price Targets
feed.summary: AMD stock is experiencing a "two-clock" dynamic at the close of 2025, balancing near-term regulatory hurdles for AI-chip approvals in China with longer-term growth driven by its 2026 rack-scale roadmap and partnerships with major customers like OpenAI and Oracle. Key catalysts include the potential for significant MI308 orders from China, institutional buying activity, and the anticipated deployments of MI450 GPUs starting in 2026. While analysts largely maintain a bullish stance with price targets suggesting notable upside, the stock's future performance hinges on both geopolitical stability regarding chip exports and the successful execution of its advanced AI infrastructure strategy.

feed.title: 11 Ross Dress for Less Finds to Grab Before the Year Is Over
feed.summary: This article highlights 11 surprising and valuable finds available at Ross Dress for Less just before the year ends, ranging from Valentine's Day themed items to designer sneakers and upscale home decor. The author, Leah Groth, shares her in-store discoveries, noting the significant discounts on popular brands and essential home goods. The piece encourages shoppers to visit Ross in person, as online shopping is not available, to take advantage of these deals.

feed.title: Surf Air Mobility (SRFM) Is Up 19.0% After Q3 Beat, Outlook Hike And Palantir SurfOS Deal
feed.summary: Surf Air Mobility (SRFM) rose 19.0% after reporting strong Q3 2025 results, exceeding revenue guidance and raising its full-year outlook. The company also expanded its SurfOS software platform through a new partnership with Palantir, focusing on the regional air mobility segment. These developments led to a Zacks Rank #2 upgrade for SRFM, highlighting improved earnings estimates and a more positive outlook for both its airline business and software ambitions.

feed.title: Omeros rockets as FDA approves Yartemlea
feed.summary: Omeros Corp (Nasdaq: OMER) shares surged 75.5% after the US FDA approved its drug Yartemlea (narsoplimab-wuug) for the treatment of hematopoietic stem cell transplant-associated thrombotic microangiopathy (TA-TMA). Yartemlea is the first and only approved lectin pathway inhibitor for this often-fatal complication. The global market for complement-mediated thrombotic microangiopathy therapies reached $2.14 billion in 2024 and is projected to grow with a CAGR of 10.7%.

feed.title: Class Action Now Underway by Pomerantz LLP Against DexCom, Inc. – DXCM
feed.summary: Pomerantz LLP has filed a class action lawsuit against DexCom, Inc. (NASDAQ: DXCM) and certain officers, alleging materially false and misleading statements regarding the Company's business, operations, and compliance policies. The lawsuit claims DexCom made unauthorized design changes to its G6 and G7 continuous glucose monitoring systems, rendering them less reliable and posing health risks, which led to significant stock price drops following FDA warnings and critical reports. Investors who purchased DexCom securities between July 26, 2024, and September 17, 2025, are encouraged to seek lead plaintiff status by December 26, 2025.
